ksa_text: Skill in designing and operating post-market monitoring systems for AI, including implementing performance surveillance and observability, identifying risk signals, integrating deployer data, and developing proxy indicators for emerging and unmeasurable risks.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of how to deploy test infrastructures with AI systems.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of automated systems analysis tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AG-S-008 (AG, Skill) maps to Data Analyst scope as weak fit. Composite score 0.6156 clears the weak fit threshold of 0.52. Top framework anchors: eu_ai_act=0.616, nist_ai_rmf=0.612, dcwf=0.425. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within analytics and business intelligence.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.6156 for weak fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA AG-S-008 (AG, composite 0.6156) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.6156 for AG domain provides sufficient cross-framework signal per NIST AI RMF; EU AI Act governance obligations; governance competencies are primarily above IC ANL scope. Strong signal across eu_ai_act=0.616, nist_ai_rmf=0.612, dcwf=0.425 indicates genuine competency overlap despite absence of direct analytics terminology. External ground truth upholds inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. Score 0.6156 exceeds external evidence threshold for AG domain inclusion in Data Analyst.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: include. P2 include confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.6156, domain AG, scope weak fit. High confidence.
